the force with which the airstream acts on a sail can be calculated using the formula  
$ F = \frac{B S \rho (v_0 - v)^2}{2} $  
where $ B $ is the aerodynamic force coefficient, $ S $ is the sail area ( $ S = 7 \, \text{m}^2 $ ), $ \rho $ is the air density, $ v_0 $ is the wind speed ( $ v_0 = 6.3 \, \text{m/s} $ ), and $ v $ is the speed of the sailboat.  
at a certain moment, the instantaneous wind power reaches its maximum value.
